prerequisites.value: Combat Reflexes, Stand Still, worshiper of the associated deity.

description.value: **Benefit:** If you use Stand Still to prevent an opponent from moving, you may make a disarm or trip combat maneuver against your target as an immediate action. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend up to 4 stamina points to gain a +1 bonus per stamina point spent on any combat maneuver check that you attempt as part of Steady Engagement.
